title: Single Photons and Polarization Encoding
description: Master the fundamentals of photonic qubits, including single-photon quantum mechanics, polarization states, and the various encoding schemes used in optical quantum computing.
learningObjectives: Understand the quantum mechanical description of single photons
Master polarization encoding for photonic qubits
Compare different qubit encoding schemes: polarization, path, and time-bin
Describe the Jones vector formalism for polarization states
Explain the advantages of photonic qubits for quantum information
